minting_now.name: ATLAS/31
minting_now.description:
ATLAS/31

A hand-drawn cartoon NFT based on a meme about interstellar comet 31/ATLAS (its name is intentionally reversed). This is a closed edition, and each NFT is unique. To create an engaging design, it has been edited, animated,

minting_now.name: Void Divers
minting_now.description: Set in the pixelated dimension of The Deep Void, these divers are the first brave souls to plunge beyond known data streams.

minting_now.name: Collectr
minting_now.description:
Monthly Art on Base - Discover our stunning editions published monthly to bring awareness to the global community. With crosschain accessibility and credit card support, we make it easy for anyone to begin their own global art collecting journey.

Created with love by [Kusari](https://kusari.org).

minting_now.name: NormieLines
minting_now.description: Normieline is a generative NFT project that transforms “normie” culture through GenArt principles. Algorithmically created variations turn everyday identities into unique digital characters, highlighting the individuality hidden within the ordinary.

minting_now.name: BOY:SCAR
minting_now.description:
BOY:SCAR is a collection of cool, scar-marked boys—each one carrying a unique identity shaped by mystery, experience, and hidden power.
Every scar tells a different story. Some were earned, some were given, and some… are still awakening.

upcoming.description: A vibrant, psychedelic reinterpretation of the Monkey King, this NFT blends surreal pop-art aesthetics with regal symbolism. Drafting Ursus - Hand drawn line art from the Ursus Universe, living on Ethereum.

Sketch Ursus. Build Universe.

upcoming.name: Gift of Time by Manuel Larino
upcoming.description:
**Gift of Time** began during my residency in Marfa, Texas, as part of the Art Blocks and OpenSea program, where a shift in the experience of time became central to the work.

Pudgy Penguins are returning to Las Vegas for this year’s Licensing Expo. For the third year in a row, we’re excited to represent Web3 and share the floor with some of the world’s greatest IPs from May 19 to 21.
NEWS: teams up with , enabling to potentially reach 500M+ investors across major trading platforms worldwide. Paxos Crypto Brokerage has also added support for PENGU.
Make your move. To all the new players and holders joining Azuki: Welcome to the Garden

From the Alley to the Garden We heard you like to move it. Madagascar. 2271km from north to south. 3 weeks. Together. 1 lucky winner takes home a pair of Shokz OpenRun Pro earphones (Kipchoge Edition) + Azuki "In the Moment" cap. Registration open Locals @ Azuki HQ Tomorrow (Tue 4/21) at 6:30pm, See you there!
